nasb.text: He shall lay his hand on the head of the sin offering and slay it for a sin offering in the place where they slay the burnt offering.

esv.text: and lay his hand on the head of the sin offering and kill it for a sin offering in the place where they kill the burnt offering.

cnv.text: 他要按手在贖罪祭牲的頭上，然後在宰燔祭牲的地方宰殺牠，作為贖罪祭。

ccb.text: 他要把手放在羊头上，在杀燔祭牲的地方宰羊。
